text_template: Support for the show comes from Quince. In the summer, everything changes. Longer days, summer Fridays, and a serious wardrobe change. You still want pieces that look good, but are also made from lighter fabrics that feel effortless. That's where Quince comes in. They focus on high-quality essentials, but without the luxury markup. Quince has beautiful everyday pieces like 100% European linen pants, dresses, and tops with styles starting at $32. Their denim is soft and easy to wear, and their organic cotton sweaters are perfect for layering on cool summer nights. Our colleague Andrew Melnyzik has gotten some Quince. Quince sent me their European linen pants and their European linen camp shirt And to be honest linen always felt a little too fancy for my style But since I got these pieces I found myself reaching for them all the time They perfect when I want to look a little more elevated but they also comfortable enough for quick trips to the grocery store or when you running errands and you want to look a little bit nicer Elevate your summer wardrobe. Go to quince.com slash explainit for free shipping on your order and 365 day returns. Now available in Canada too. That's Q-U-I-N-C-E dot com slash explain it for free shipping and 365 day returns. Quince.com slash explain it.
